summary: Completed comprehensive timezone fix testing - all formatLocalDateTime and formatLocalDateTimeFull utilities working correctly across the application. Users now see proper local timezone instead of raw UTC strings.
passed_tests: Homepage loads successfully with timezone formatted match times
formatLocalDateTime utility properly formats dates as 'Today, 17:30', 'Tomorrow, 19:30', 'Wednesday, 18:00'
formatLocalDateTimeFull utility available for match detail pages
GuessIt countdown timers work correctly with utcDate (showing proper countdown like '01:10:15')
League filter switching (La Liga, Premier League, Serie A, Bundesliga) maintains timezone formatting
Tab switching (Popular, Soon, Top Live, Ended) preserves local datetime display
No raw UTC strings (Z, GMT, UTC) displayed to users
No console errors related to date formatting or undefined utcDate
Backend API endpoints working properly (7/8 passed)
Match cards use match.utcDate with formatLocalDateTime instead of raw match.dateTime
All datetime displays show user-friendly formats instead of backend UTC
